{{CargoRelic
|name=Planter Certificate
|class_id=20538
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=An honor bestowed by environmental organizations. This certificate is awarded to anyone who takes action and contributes to the greening of the Earth. Each certificate has a unique number, and having it allows you to proudly proclaim yourself as an honorable planter!
|fame=13
|art=15
|fth=15
|civ=32
|tech=15
|ss1=Snail HP +200<br>Per 10 times Maneater fed, Snail ATK +1<br>Maneater Fed: 400/400
|ss2=Snail HP +400<br>Per 10 times Maneater fed, Snail ATK +2<br>Maneater Fed: 400/400
|ss3=Snail HP +600<br>Per 10 times Maneater fed, Snail ATK +3<br>Maneater Fed: 400/400
|ss4=Snail HP +600<br>Per 10 times Maneater fed, Snail ATK +3<br>Maneater Fed: 400/400
|ss7=Snail HP +600<br>Per 10 times Maneater fed, Snail ATK +3<br>Maneater Fed: 400/400<br> (Awakened)
}}
